notes: Verbatim, BOUNDED corpus of the Texas court rules a Texas civil-practice / consumer-debt / family-law / justice-court drafter actually cites, extracted by scripts/pull_texas_rules.py from the consolidated rule PDFs the Office of Court Administration publishes at txcourts.gov. Each set file carries the verbatim rule text under '## Rule N. Title' headings. The TRCP PDF feeds two files: the main civil-procedure set and the Part V (Justice Court, Rules 500-510) set. The OCA re-issues amended editions at new /media/ paths, so the 'pdf' field records the current edition; update it when an amendment lands. Widen a set by adding rule numbers to its 'rules' list. pypdf is an optional dependency: without it (or on a failed download / no-rule-found), the set file is written as an honest pointer stub carrying the canonical PDF URL — never fabricated text. A _file_is_stub guard preserves committed verbatim content on a failed run (pass --force to overwrite).

targets.name: Texas Rules of Civil Procedure — Part V (Justice Court)
